scene_input.scene_summary: Al-Mughīrah ibn Shu'bah and the delegation approach al-Lāt.
scene_input.key_visual_action: al-Mughīrah ibn Shu'bah holding an axe, with a determined look on his face

schema_output.scene_title: Al-Mughīrah ibn Shu'bah and the Delegation Approach al-Lāt
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 349
schema_output.moral_lesson: The importance of standing up against idolatry and false beliefs

characters.name: al-Mughīrah ibn Shu'bah
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, one hand extended holding an axe

characters.name: delegation
characters.appearance: group of older men with various builds and facial features, wearing traditional Arabian clothing in earthy tones, some with head coverings

schema_output.narrative_text: Al-Mughīrah ibn Shu'bah, a brave companion of the Prophet, led a delegation to Ṭā'if to destroy the idols and bring people to the truth.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. Exterior of a 7th century Ṭā'if temple, with a large stone statue of the central figure in the center, surrounded by smaller stone statues of other idols. The temple walls are made of rough-hewn stone blocks in warm beige and gray tones. Late afternoon sunlight casts a golden glow on the scene, with a few wispy clouds in the sky. In the foreground, a group of older men, the delegation, walk towards the temple, led by a tall figure in the distance, seen from behind: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, one hand extended holding an axe. The men wear traditional Arabian clothing in earthy tones, some with head coverings. Soft warm golden light, determined and courageous mood. Medium shot at eye level. Warm beige, gray, and green palette with the deep green cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
